title: Burg-Wachter 12mm Sold Bike Security Chain Diamond Lock, Black, 1M
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Sold Secure Diamond Bike Security Kit Consists Of;
GMK 12mm Chain - 1M Length - Sold Secure Diamond
Ideal For Securing Your Bike At Home Or Away
description: From the manufacturer Who We Are Burg Wächter offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Burg-Wächter, Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer and a trusted brand throughout the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer Burg-Wächter 1M 12mm Sold Secure Security Kit Diamond Cycle & Gold Motorbike Sold Secure rated The Burg-Wächter GKM 12mm 1m Sold Secure security kit is ideal for securing you valuable bike or belongings. The chain is made from case hardened steel which is hacksaw and bolt cropper resistant. The body of the lock is made of hardened steel and the 16mm shackle is made of case hardened steel, both providing tough resistance to attack. The shackle is secured by a double bolted disk mechanism locking both ends. Both the chain & anchor are Sold Secure Diamond insurance rated for cycles. Kit Consists Of The Below Sold Secure Tested Individual Products GKM 1m 12mm Hardened Steel Security Chain - Sold Secure Diamond Cycle 100D 16mm Double Bolted Hardened Steel U Lock - Sold Secure Diamond Cycle 12mm Thick Chain Links Give The Ultimate In Protection, Ideal For Long Term Securing Of Your Belongings 16MM U Lock The Burg Wächter 100D U-lock is a heavy duty lock ideal for securing up to 12mm chains and cables. The body of the lock is made of hardened steel and the 16mm shackle is made of case hardened steel, both providing tough resistance to attack. The shackle is secured by a double bolted disk mechanism locking both ends and can be completely detached from the body of the lock when unlocked. The lock is weather resistant and suitable for outdoor use, with a keyhole cover protecting the internals. Sold Secure Rated We are proud that our kit meets the important Sold Secure testing for bicycles & motorcycles. This is important as most insurance companies specify this standard to cover your property away from home. The 12mm GKM chain is Sold Secure Diamond for cycles & Gold for motorbikes. The 100D U Lock is diamond for cycles & gold for motorcycles. 12mm Hardended Steel The chain is manufactured from hardened steel to give it maximum protection from attack & help it meet the Sold Secure Gold insurance standard. Its also supplied with a flexible polyester black sleeve to prevent scratches & damage to your belongings.
